calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank.
Defendant Nelia Balisi was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 3, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, May 17, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, and against defendant Nelia Balisi as follows:

Principal - $19,431.19.
Interest - $1,627.91.
Costs - $457.00.

Total - $21,516.10.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

In a separate written agreement between the parties, plaintiff shall not enforce this judgment provided defendant Nelia Balisi pays plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank $250.00 per month, conmmencing June 15, 2010.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Set For Trial On May-17-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
